name: Beauty Jigsaw
short_description: "Beauty Jigsaw" is a beautiful girl puzzle game with exquisite picture. We recommend that you open this game at your leisure time, while brewing a cup of fragrant coffee, and then enjoy a relaxing puzzle time ^_^
detailed_description:
If you need a relaxing, eye candy, classic puzzle game, then don't miss the "Beauty Jigsaw"!

Open the game, select your favorite beautiful girl image, by dragging the pieces to reassemble the image, to enjoy the puzzle fun.

You can safely close the game while playing and continue the last unfinished game at any time in the future.

The finished images will be unlocked in the gallery for you to enjoy at any time.

Game Features:

  • 120 carefully selected images of beautiful girls
  • 25 touching piano pieces
  • 4 different styles of atlas (Otaku, Realistic, Comics, 3D)
  • 3 kinds of complexity from easy to difficult

New feature:

Combined drag and drop

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
